Keep mind that during major “disaster” many the tools referenced herein may not available until they are recovered.
This toolkit not definitive list technology resources, nor designed address non-technical issues, such attendance policies pedagogical best practices.
You will not need take action every recommendation the toolkit.
Simply pick and choose the information that most useful for your teaching context.
part your preparations, protect your remote location (home) computers with anti-virus software help ensure they will reliable when you need them.

Modern smart phones and cell connected devices provide the best way access email during emergencies.
Cell networks are often buffered from the disruptions power and are less susceptible wind damage than cable, phone and fiber networks.
When the worst does happen cellular services are some the first systems restored.
Microsoft Outlook for IOS and Android provides modern interface with functionality superior either Suite Gmail Office <hide> Exchange Online.
Inbox Google also provides updated user experience compared native phone apps.
Request email distribution list for your class MyUW under the Teaching tab.
These class lists are created the time they are requested and will ready use the following day.
you want create list for cross-listed courses combinations courses, submit Mailman Instructor Class List request.
You could also post the class contact list connect students with one another.
Most social networking services like SnapChat, Twitter and Facebook have wide adoption, but are not safe for FERPA and HIPAA content.
These services may used for some purposes, but great care would need taken not expose sensitive information, such who course.
Consider using Yammer, which provides FERPA and HIPAA-aligned environment.
Skype for Business, which both HIPAA– and FERPA-aligned, allows you conduct chat with participants and meeting with <hide> participants.
Learn more here.
Zoom makes easy for faculty, staff, and students participate group video chat during online class sessions, host virtual office hours, collaborate remotely research, share screens and host real-time video conversations, host live web broadcasts thousands people worldwide and record the cloud computer for easy sharing.
For more information Zoom free accounts and Zoom Pro accounts and differences between the two learn more here.
Google Hangouts works with people time.
While you can invite many people you want join hangout, you can’t have more than people hangout once, while others will get stuck hanging lobby.
Hangouts FERPA–aligned, but does not have the BAA required HIPAA.
Hangouts feature Suite.
For more about how Hangouts works, see Google’s page about Google Hangouts.
Both Google Hangouts and Skype for Business are good tools for chats and conferencing.
Turn your voicemail box into telephone hotline.
Simply update your greeting with timely information about the status your course(s) campus operations.
Contact Information Technology (help@uw.edu) create enhanced hotline functionality such call menus.
The Canvas Learning Management system offers conference feature, available every course, that you can use meet live with students.
Conferences can accommodate people.
Learn more.
You can also use Zoom Skype for Business.
Zoom unifies cloud video conferencing, simple online meetings, group messaging, and software-defined conference room solution into one easy-to-use platform.
For more information Zoom you can learn more here.
Skype for Business (formerly known “Lync”), which both HIPAA– and FERPA-aligned, allows you conduct chat with participants and meeting with <hide> participants.
Learn more here.
Panopto cloud-based lecture capture service.
Panopto lets instructors record and publish lectures and other class activities online.
Students can then view (and review) the published materials using Web browser mobile device.
You can use Panopto two modes: pre-record and then post video lectures, broadcast live lecture (with three-second delay).
The first mode allows you upload supplemental video content and add notes your course materials.
Panopto not meant used conferencing tool.
find out more about Panopto, visit the Panopto Help Center.
Canvas Student Groups are like smaller version your course and are used collaborative tool where students can work together group projects and assignments.
Learn more.
Every Canvas course includes the ability create and review quizzes.
Learn more about creating and managing quizzes Canvas.
Learn more about creating quizzes Canvas.
The Canvas Gradebook helps instructors easily record student scores online, track student progress and calculate final grades.
Grades for each assignment can calculated points, percentages, complete incomplete, pass fail, GPA scale, and letter grades.
Provide secure access co-instructors and TAs view and edit student grades.
Publish scores for students view securely online.
Learn more.
GradePage simple interface for quarterly grade submission, can used GradeBook users, Canvas users and those who manage their grades using other software traditional approach.
Learn more.
Methods are available for accessing campus materials from your personal laptop home computer.
First check with your departmental support staff; your department may already have system place for accessing files from home.
Most faculty connect the network from home through their Internet Service Provider (ISP).
Learn more.
Connecting the Network will allow you access most your class resources and tools from home the event that you need conduct your class remotely.
The preferred method connecting through Husky OnNet (based the BIG-IP platform) which provides individual users with secure temporary connection the network from remote locations.
Husky OnNet for MacOS and Husky OnNet for Windows are available for download from UWare.
Self-supported Android, iOS,and other BIG-IP apps are available from third-party app stores.
Remote desktop access allows you access your work computer using another computer with connection the Internet.
Your icons, programs and printers are all available.
You can even transfer files between your systems.
(For security purposes, remote desktop should only used conjunction with secure connection the network such Husky OnNet.)
order use remote desktop access, your work computer will need remain (you can logged out, but the computer must not turned off) and you will need know your work computer’s current address name.
you need help finding your address, contact your local support staff.
Find out more about this option Connecting Remotely.
Because remote desktop access requires your work computer remain when you are not work, the better option store your materials online (see “Store Your Course Materials Online” section, below) and then use Husky OnNet (see “Connect the Networks” section, below).
Contact Information Technology (help@uw.edu) regarding telephones, NetIDs, MyUW, email distribution lists, and general help with any the technologies mentioned above.
Contact the Center for Teaching and Learning (thectl@uw.edu) talk about best practices, whether out the classroom.
Contact Disability Services Office (dso@uw.edu) ensure all your students with disabilities are accommodated your technology choices.
For information about campus pandemic planning and communications during possible pandemic: Emergency Management Website, MyUW emergency announcements, UWTV, email.

original text:
What Foster Care?
Foster care volunteers provide temporary care for kittens, puppies, dogs and cats.
The Foster Care Program serves lifeline for those animals who come under eight-weeks-old, very sick, injured, needing some extra socialization training.
Our Foster Families provide quiet, stress-free, and loving environments, allowing every pet that fostered through our program better chance happier and healthier life with forever family.
Some animals may only need home for several days they need gain weight before surgery, while others may need several weeks care the case broken bone.
offering your time, energy and home animal need, you prepare the animal for adoption into permanent home well prevent overcrowding our adoption center.
The Maryland SPCA always looking for foster parents help save more animals’ lives.
get choose what types pets foster?
Yes.
your initial interview our program coordinator will ask what types pets you are interested fostering.
During this time, the coordinator will also over detail all the types fostering situations.
Together you will discuss the best fit for you and your family.
you begin your fostering journey with dogs, you may always switch cats (and vice versa) the future.
Switching easy discussion with the program coordinator when that time comes.
What the foster home not fitting into lifestyle and/or not getting along with pets?
our best make good match from the beginning providing foster parents with all the information know about pet before pick up.
ask that you try make work but understand that sometimes just not good fit.
There “two-week shut down period” where you will not have the foster and your pet together under any circumstance.
after that time too difficult keep them separate and/or they are not getting along the program coordinator will assist you returning the pet back the shelter.
What need unexpectedly leave town while have foster home?
understand that things come up!
you unexpectedly need leave town you will expected inform the program coordinator and return your foster animal the shelter.
How often does foster animal need brought for check-ups?
Foster parent volunteers need transport animals the SPCA regular basis for vaccinations, vet checks, weight checks and spay and neuter surgeries.
Vaccination appointments and weigh-ins for kittens and puppies are scheduled every two weeks.
Veterinarian appointments are scheduled needed for each animal.
What I’m unavailable foster animal when you call?
Will foster animal have accidents cause damage?
need keep foster animals separate from pets?
mentioned above there “two-week shutdown period” during which you will need keep the foster animal separate from your pets.
The shutdown period meant give the new animal time adjust you and your family and new environment, and prevent the spread illnesses.
may seem complicated but trust us, it’s best for you, your pets and your foster!
Will the SPCA treat personal pet injured becomes sick because foster animal?
love the idea fostering, but I’m worried about how I’ll feel when it’s time for the animal brought back the shelter for adoption.
can difficult let once you have become emotionally attached foster animal.
prepared for tears and some heartache when you bring your foster animals back the SPCA.
But remember, foster care volunteers play crucial part helping unwanted animals get permanent, loving homes they deserve.
What friend family member wants adopt foster animal?
Thank you for helping find homes for your foster animals!
Please keep mind however, that the animals will not available until their medical work, including spay neuter surgery, completed.
Please refer interested adopters the SPCA Foster Care Program <hide>-<hide>-<hide> x<hide> foster@mdspca.org start the adoption conversation.
What want adopt the animal I’m fostering?
This can happen when foster parents fall love with the animals.
you wish adopt foster animal, please call the program coordinator start the adoption conversation.
Having available foster homes crucial for saving lives, ask foster parents consider how adopting foster animal may affect their ability continue fostering other animals the future.
you are interested fostering for the Maryland SPCA, you can begin the application process completing our foster care application online.
The questions asked the application are ensure that your foster experience positive for both you and the animals.
When completed, please send your application the SPCA email foster@mdspca.org, fax (<hide>) <hide>-<hide> mail Maryland SPCA c/o Kaitlyn Thomas, <hide> Falls Rd., Baltimore, <hide>.

Academic advising plays important role for all students Illinois Tech.
The few minutes takes review course choices and discuss scheduling options with adviser helps ensure all courses taken will apply towards the student’s degree program.
Graduate students are required consult with academic advisor course choices order obtain the Advising PIN.
student enrollment Illinois Tech.
New On-Campus Graduate Students will receive their PIN after completing Advising and Registration session held during the week prior courses starting.
Students will receive email communication how sign for these sessions.
you have not received such communication, please email Renee McBrien mcbrienr@iit.edu the FdSN Department for instructions.
Online, Certificate, and Non-Degree Graduate Students must consult with their Advisor, Renee McBrien mcbrienr@iit.edu, receive their PIN and discuss course choices.
Once the PIN issued and used for registration, will appear the IIT personal channel myIIT portal.
FdSN students will emailed their advisor how schedule Advising Appointment.

original text:
New Zealand will vote two-part binding flag referendum.
The first vote, between November and December <hide>, which five designs you would prefer the flag changes.
Flags originated the battlefield both show one’s side ones soldiers and show archers the way the wind blew.
The upper left quarter our flag shows both our British heritage and Christian tradition.
combines the red cross George, the patron saint England since <hide>, the diagonal white cross Andrew Scotland, and the extra red diagonal cross symbolizing Ireland.
The stars denote the Southern Cross, the constellation the southern hemisphere, symbolizing our geographic location.
The flag Captain James Cook raised New Zealand <hide> near Gisborne was the old Union flag Britain bearing the crosses George and Andrew, but not Ireland.
The flag that draped the table Waitangi when the treaty was signed February <hide>, was the British Union flag that included the diagonal red cross Ireland, use since <hide> when Ireland became part the United Kingdom.
The New Zealand flag its current form goes back British government directive <hide>.
This instructed all colonies that ships belonging them should fly the Blue Ensign with the Union flag the upper left corner and blue background other quarters.
The New Zealand government <hide> incorporated the Southern Cross the blue background.
This flag was first flown ships and then land.
was not until June <hide>, <hide>, that this flag was officially gazetted the national flag.
McLean wrote: “When honour the flag are not honouring the fabric the colours but what those colours represent and have represented over the ages”.
Keep the flag flying available for $<hide> from good book shop near you from trosspub@gmail.com.
I've got $<hide> which says the flag will stay is.
$<hide> per bet.
for one will vote NO.
somewhat bemused the lack noise from maori regarding possible flag change.
There are couple flags purported represent various tribes, federations whatever, but not aware any input from maori regarding what national flag should be.
Methinks maybe something else going are not aware of.

original text:
surprise that President Obama chose nominate Ms. Elena Kagan for Supreme Court Justice.
Kagan was the short list last year, when Obama nominated Sonia Sotomayor, and has been the obvious front-runner for this past year.
confirmed, this New York maverick will the third woman serve the current court and years old, will also the youngest Supreme Court Justice history which will most likely give her the longest tenure.
Not only was she the first woman represent the government Solicitor General this past year, but was also the first woman serve dean Harvard law school.
When deciding whom nominate replace the retiring Justice Stevens, President Obama was predominantly concerned with changing the ideological dynamic the current conservative court.
realized that did not need steadfast leftist, but wanted someone who would able influence and persuade Justice Kennedy’s swing vote away from the rightward direction the court currently prevalent under Chief Justice Roberts.
Fortunately for the President, found the perfect candidate.
Ms. Kagan not the typical Democratic nominee; she not extremely left, nor she the center, but somewhere between.
She believes strong executive power and also active judiciary, not mere interpreter the constitution and statutes passed the legislature.
This why she would most likely face opposition from both sides the Senate Judiciary confirmation, right wing conservatives and liberals alike.
Although she has impressive background law, one thing that may seen working against her her lack judicial experience.
Many have been and are continuously accusing Kagan not being qualified for the position, reasoning that she has never once served judge.
But whether Kagan has had judicial experience should real concern.
She may have never before been working judge, but the extensive amount knowledge and experience law that she would bringing the court far exceeds any mere judicial experience.
addition representing the government court the first woman Solicitor General, she has also served Domestic Policy Aide under President Clinton, Senate Staff member under President Obama and Vice President Joe Biden, briefly worked maintaining private practice, and received degrees from Princeton, Oxford, and Harvard.
She has had experience all three branches government, which more than enough qualify her for the position.
quite obvious that Kagan will face battle the confirmation room, but these Senators really try evaluate both her weaknesses and her strengths, they will have tough time doubting her remarkable credentials.
true that she would the first nominee almost four decades not have had previous judicial experience, but one does not have sit judge court understand everything there know about law and the legal system.
And let’s face it, Kagan confirmed, will not make too much difference.
She may actively express her judicial philosophy judge who legislates from the bench, but much she preaches, she will never have the power completely change the dynamics the U.S. political system.
Yes, there are three separate branches government and may seem they are all equally powerful, but does not take much brain power realize the limited role Supreme Court justice.
confirmed, Kagan will one nine members, giving her just enough power counter the rightward polarization the court which will allow ample space for Obama make some real changes, but not enough for her actually legislate and implement laws.
fact, nominee who believes active judiciary, opposed strict constructionist, should not feared but embraced, for just what this country needs.
Like President Obama has always expressed, this country desperate need change.
And hopefully the Senate confirms Obama’s nomination for Ms. Elena Kagan July, some real changes can made soon October just the Supreme Court starts its next term.
Nesma Tawil second-year political science major.
She can reached ntawil@uci.edu.
